name: Fractured Linkage
oracle_text:
Combine.
Whenever ~ is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, energize.
flavor_text: A single piece of a much larger machine.
design_notes: This card serves as a high-CMC 'component' for the Combine engine. While 5 mana is heavy for a common, its ability to provide both the 'Combine' fodder and fuel via the Energon keyword action makes it a valuable mid-game piece. It bridges the two core mechanics: using graveyard recursion (Combine) and resource generation (Energon), functioning as a strategic pivot point for players looking to assemble larger Titans.
